Implemented `scripts/session_start.py` as the single entrypoint: if the home dir isn't symlinked yet it injects a SETUP.md runbook, otherwise it injects a session brief with the tracked git location, workflow list, and an optional BRIEF.md. Updated agent.yaml to simply run this script at session start instead of listing workflows statically.
